publishedAbstract: - ReclaimSpaceJob is failing due to "Read-only file system" error by rbd sparsify. ~~~ Failed to make controller request: failed to sparsify volume "ocs-storagecluster-cephblockpool/csi-vol-xxxx-xxxx": failed to sparsify image: rbd: ret=-30, Read-only file system ~~~
publishedTitle: ReclaimSpaceJob in ODF fails with rbd sparsify error : "failed to sparsify image: rbd: ret=-30, Read-only file system"
